notes: TTS reliability fixes for the 'first 2 sentences play then silence' pattern on Android Chrome. (1) Pre-emptive synth.cancel() before each speak() if the engine is in speaking/pending state — clears stuck queue from a prior utterance. (2) Removed the periodic pause/resume watchdog: it was meant to defeat Chrome's 15-second utterance timeout, but on Android it corrupts engine state between sentences. Sentences are short enough that the timeout doesn't apply. (3) Audio-state indicator now also surfaces TTS progress (e.g. 'tts 3/12') so you can see where the engine wedges if it does. SW cache bumped to v6.
